steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
Given user navigates to short video upload section of create page of MLS
And user uploads "MLS_Short_Video.mp4" file for testing short video upload
When user navigates to "Short Videos" section of Manage
Then user verify short video page
Then user search the "MLS_Short_Video" in short video filter and play the video
